title: Aureline work-item status-transition packet vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the status_transition_packet_record frozen in docs/work_items/work_item_contract.md. One record family pins a previewed-but-not-yet-applied transition over a work-item detail row: the typed transition kinds (comment, assignee, state, label, linked branch / review mutation, unlink, validation-evidence attachment, publish-preview update, subscriber, blocking relationship), the resolved transition_action_class that says whether the action will mutate provider state, save a local draft only, queue for publish-later, route through a browser-handoff packet, or stay inspect-only, the projected notification side effects, the projected permission scope, and the typed transition_admissibility_class that gates the apply path. The packet never claims the provider has accepted the transition; the packet is the structured preview the user confirms against, and the apply path is a separate event recorded through the provider-mode contract (publish_now ticket, deferred_publish queue item, open_in_provider browser handoff) or through the local-draft commit path. Composes with the work_item_detail_record schema (binds back to one detail row), the publish-later contract (cites publish_later_queue_item_record, provider_consequence_preview_record, account_mapping_binding_record, provider_callback_envelope_record on apply), the review-workspace / review-pack / change-stack contracts (cites review_workspace_record, review_pack_record, change_object_record, patch_stack_record on linked-branch / linked-review / change-intent transitions), the browser-handoff packet (cites browser_handoff_packet_record on route_through_browser_handoff transitions), and the offline-handoff packet (cites offline_handoff_packet_record when the transition was captured offline). Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw label values that disclose customer / tenant identity, raw notification message bodies, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, and raw stdout / stderr never cross this boundary regardless of redaction class. The eventual work-items crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record_kind, transition_kind_class, transition_action_class, notification_side_effect_class, permission_scope_class, transition_admissibility_class, denial_reason, or audit_event_id is additive-minor and bumps status_transition_packet_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

status_transition_packet_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the status-transition packet vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / queue-review rollups / admin-reconciliation consoles. Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw label values that disclose customer / tenant identity, raw notification message bodies, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, and raw stdout / stderr never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for support / audit / queue-review / admin-reconciliation surfaces; never carries the raw payload.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in preview, queue-review, and export review surfaces. Never carries the raw payload.

provider_actor_class.description: Provider-actor class re-exported verbatim from schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json. 'unknown_actor_class' is repair-only and MUST NOT be collapsed with any other class.

trust_posture.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state the transition packet was authored under.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class re-exported from ADR-0010 / ADR-0007. Raw payloads never cross this boundary regardless of class.

mutation_mode.description: Mutation mode re-exported verbatim from schemas/providers/publish_later_record.schema.json (ADR-0010). The transition packet pre-resolves the mode at preview time so the user confirms against the same vocabulary every other provider-linked surface uses.

transition_kind_class.description: Frozen transition-kind axis. A single packet MAY carry one transition_entry per kind (or multiple of the same kind) but every entry resolves a typed transition_action_class so a downstream surface can disclose mutate-vs-draft truth mechanically.

transition_action_class.description: Frozen transition-action class. mutate_provider_state_publish_now means the apply path will mint a publish_now approval ticket and call the provider immediately; save_local_draft_only_no_provider_path means the apply path will write a local draft and never call the provider; queue_for_publish_later_deferred means the apply path will mint a publish_later_queue_item_record (deferred_publish); route_through_browser_handoff_open_in_provider means the apply path will hand off to the system browser through a browser_handoff_packet_record (open_in_provider); inspect_only_no_mutation means the packet is a structured what-if preview with no apply path; captured_offline_pending_drain means the transition was captured offline and is pinned to an offline_handoff_packet_record awaiting drain through the publish-later queue.

notification_side_effect_class.description: Frozen notification-side-effect class projected by the transition. notification_unknown_until_publish_admitted_pending_review is the safe default when the apply path will route through a queue or browser handoff and the actual notification fan-out cannot be predicted before drain; the surface MUST disclose the unknown lane rather than label it as 'no notification'.

permission_scope_class.description: Frozen permission-scope class projected by the transition. permission_unknown_pending_actor_resolution is admissible only when the bound account_mapping_binding_record is in pending_user_selection / pending_account_link / pending_policy_review.

transition_admissibility_class.description: Frozen transition-admissibility class. The packet pre-resolves admissibility against the bound work_item_detail_record's write_authority_class, the workspace trust state, the freshness floor, and the account-mapping binding so the apply control reads the typed admissibility lane mechanically.

linked_artifact_change_class.description: Frozen artifact-binding mutation class for transitions whose kind is link_branch_or_worktree, unlink_branch_or_worktree, link_review_or_change_object, unlink_review_or_change_object, attach_validation_evidence, detach_validation_evidence, or update_publish_preview. The packet preserves the typed bind / unbind action and the matching opaque ref so a downstream surface can apply the linkage mechanically.

previous_state_value.description: Verbatim previous state token (lifecycle / priority / milestone / label / assignee subject ref, etc.). Empty when the transition kind has no previous-state slot (e.g. add_or_update_comment).

next_state_value.description: Verbatim next state token. Empty when the transition kind has no next-state slot (e.g. delete_comment, unbind_review_pack_record_id_ref).

linked_artifact_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the artifact the bind / unbind acts on. Required when linked_artifact_change_class is one of the bind_* / unbind_* values; empty for no_artifact_change.

linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the browser_handoff_packet_record the apply path will route through. Required when transition_action_class is route_through_browser_handoff_open_in_provider.

linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the publish_later_queue_item_record the apply path will mint or update. Required when transition_action_class is queue_for_publish_later_deferred or captured_offline_pending_drain.

linked_provider_consequence_preview_reco.description: Opaque ref to the provider_consequence_preview_record bound to this transition entry. Required when transition_action_class is mutate_provider_state_publish_now or queue_for_publish_later_deferred.

linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the account_mapping_binding_record the apply path resolves under. Required when permission_scope_class is permission_unknown_pending_actor_resolution.

linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_.description: Opaque ref to the offline_handoff_packet_record the transition was captured into. Required when transition_action_class is captured_offline_pending_drain.

allOf.description: captured_offline_pending_drain MUST cite a non-empty linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_ref AND a non-empty linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_id_ref.
Linked-artifact bind / unbind kinds MUST cite a typed linked_artifact_change_class outside no_artifact_change AND a non-empty linked_artifact_record_id_ref.
save_local_draft_only_no_provider_path MUST resolve notification_side_effect_class to no_notification_locally_only.
inspect_only_no_mutation MUST resolve notification_side_effect_class to no_notification_locally_only and transition_admissibility_class to admissible_inspect_only_what_if.

transition_entry.description: One transition entry. A packet carries an ordered list of entries; the apply path applies them in order under the same approval-ticket / queue-item / browser-handoff envelope.

origin_disclosure.description: Canonical Aureline origin the packet was authored under. Revalidated at apply; an apply against a mismatched origin denies.

policy_context.description: Policy context the packet was authored under. Revalidated at apply; a policy-epoch roll between author and apply re-evaluates the packet.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason vocabulary. silent_provider_mutation_under_local_draft_label_forbidden is the gate that forbids a packet from claiming save_local_draft_only_no_provider_path while citing any provider-bound apply ref (queue item, browser-handoff packet, consequence preview, callback envelope).

audit_event_id.description: Closed audit-event vocabulary for status-transition packet lifecycle.

work_item_detail_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound work_item_detail_record the packet previews a transition over.

transition_entries.description: Ordered transition entries the apply path commits in order.

packet_admissibility_class.description: Packet-level admissibility class. The apply control disables / enables based on this; the per-entry admissibility classes MUST all resolve to admissible_* lanes when packet_admissibility_class is admissible_*.

linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound publish_later_queue_item_record. Required when mutation_mode is deferred_publish or any transition entry resolves to queue_for_publish_later_deferred / captured_offline_pending_drain.

linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound browser_handoff_packet_record. Required when mutation_mode is open_in_provider or any transition entry resolves to route_through_browser_handoff_open_in_provider.

linked_provider_consequence_preview_reco.description: Opaque ref to the bound provider_consequence_preview_record. Required when mutation_mode is publish_now, deferred_publish, or open_in_provider for irreversible or release-class actions.

linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the bound account_mapping_binding_record when actor resolution is pending. Required when any transition entry resolves to permission_unknown_pending_actor_resolution.

linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_.description: Opaque ref to the bound offline_handoff_packet_record when the packet was captured offline. Required when any transition entry resolves to captured_offline_pending_drain.

supersedes_status_transition_packet_reco.description: Opaque ref to a prior status_transition_packet_record this one supersedes (e.g. after the user re-confirmed under a fresh consequence preview).

expires_at.description: Monotonic timestamp after which the packet must not be applied without re-confirmation. The apply path denies an expired packet with policy_epoch_expired_re_evaluation_required.

allOf.description: mutation_mode publish_now MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_consequence_preview_record_id_ref.
mutation_mode deferred_publish MUST cite a non-empty linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_id_ref.
mutation_mode open_in_provider MUST cite a non-empty linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.
mutation_mode local_draft and inspect_only MUST NOT cite provider-bound apply refs (queue item, browser-handoff packet, consequence preview).

status_transition_packet_record.description: Frozen status-transition packet for one work-item detail row. The packet is the structured preview the user confirms against; the apply path is recorded through the provider-mode contract (publish_now ticket, deferred_publish queue item, open_in_provider browser handoff) or the local-draft commit path. The packet never claims the provider has accepted the transition.

status_transition_packet_audit_event_rec.description: Audit-event row for the status-transition packet lifecycle. Denial events MUST cite a typed reason from the closed denial vocabulary.
